name: Mexican Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a pan.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool before removing from the pan.
7. Frost with cream cheese frosting mixed with vanilla extract.
